text:
Fatal trap 12  page fault in kernel
fault virtual address )xf06e5042
fault code   supervisor read, page not present
Instruction pointer 0x8: 0xf018bbf0
Code seg: Base 0x0 limit 0xfffff type 0x1b
          dpl 0 pres 1 def32 1 gran 1
processor eflags interrupt enabled, resume, iopl=0
current process = 74 (named)
interrupt mask = net
panic: page fault

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: 
1) reboot with new kernel, ensuring that new route/routed get used.
2) nslookup:
   > ftp.uu.net

approx 1 minute later (variable) - panic....
